title: bellevalia ciliata subsp. glauca
intro: Bellevalia ciliata subsp. glauca, also known as the Mediterranean spring starflower, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
